languages.text: "Даже не мечтай". {n}Оскал, появившийся на красивом лице наследницы, весьма красноречив.{/n} "Мои тайны умрут со мной".
"Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."
languages.original_text: "Даже не мечтай". {n}Оскал, появившийся на красивом лице наследницы, весьма красноречив.{/n} "Мои тайны умрут со мной".

traits.locale_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."
"Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."
"Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

languages.text: «Ni lo sueñe». {n}La sonrisa que se extiende por su hermoso rostro te dice todo lo que necesitas saber.{/n} «Mis secretos morirán conmigo».
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

traits.locale_text: «Ni lo sueñe». {n}La sonrisa que se extiende por su hermoso rostro te dice todo lo que necesitas saber.{/n} «Mis secretos morirán conmigo».

languages.text: “想都别想。”{n}那张美丽的脸上绽放出得意的笑容，这表情说明了一切。{/n}“我会把秘密带进坟墓里。”
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

traits.locale_text: “想都别想。”{n}那张美丽的脸上绽放出得意的笑容，这表情说明了一切。{/n}“我会把秘密带进坟墓里。”

languages.text: « Jamais de la vie. » {n}Le rictus qui s'épanouit sur ses traits gracieux vous dit tout ce que vous avez besoin de savoir.{/n} « Mes secrets mourront avec moi. »
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

traits.locale_text: « Jamais de la vie. » {n}Le rictus qui s'épanouit sur ses traits gracieux vous dit tout ce que vous avez besoin de savoir.{/n} « Mes secrets mourront avec moi. »

languages.text: "İmkânı yok." {n}Güzel yüzünde beliren sırıtış, bilmen gereken her şeyi sana anlatıyor.{/n} "Sırlarım benimle mezara gidecek."
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

traits.locale_text: "İmkânı yok." {n}Güzel yüzünde beliren sırıtış, bilmen gereken her şeyi sana anlatıyor.{/n} "Sırlarım benimle mezara gidecek."

languages.text: "Keine Chance." {n}Das Grinsen auf ihrem schönen Gesicht sagt dir alles, was du wissen musst.{/n} "Meine Geheimnisse werden mit mir sterben."
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."

traits.locale_text: "Keine Chance." {n}Das Grinsen auf ihrem schönen Gesicht sagt dir alles, was du wissen musst.{/n} "Meine Geheimnisse werden mit mir sterben."

languages.text: 「そんなことはありえないわ」{n}彼女の美しい顔に浮かぶ微笑みは、全てを物語る。{/n} 「私の秘密は、私と共に消えるわ」
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."
